query: SELECT mi.id, mi.name, mi.categoryId, mc.name as catName, mi.imageUrl FROM menu_items mi JOIN menu_categories mc ON mi.categoryId = mc.id WHERE mi.categoryId IN (270002, 270004, 270006, 270008);
